attributes.name: Office Stash — Manhattan
attributes.notes: Long-hold collector picks kept off-site at the office wine locker (pro-managed, 55°F, low light). Both bottles are drinking-window outliers: the Grange peaks in the 2030s–40s, the Radikon is just entering its window now. Don't touch without checking the drinking window dashboard first.
